title: Rotini CLI Spec Schema
description: Combined schema for a Rotini CLI spec file (.rotini.json)

$schema.description: URL identifying the rotini schema version. The version segment must match the installed rotini binary version.

short_description.description: One-line description shown in parent help output

long_description.description: Detailed description shown in per-command help output

examples.description: Example usage lines shown in root help output

usage.description: Custom usage string shown instead of auto-generated usage line

deprecated.description: When true, marks the definition as deprecated. Handlers can check .Deprecated to emit their own warnings.

inputs.description: Typed inputs for this command: flags, arguments, configuration file values, and environment variables

output.description: Declares the typed output shape for this command's Run handler. Generates a Result struct with the declared fields.

schemas.description: Reusable schema definitions. Referenced elsewhere via $ref.

configuration_files.description: Config files to load at startup.

groups.description: Named groups for organising commands in help output.

remote_commands.description: Explicit list of co-located remote binaries dispatched as first-class commands.

timeout.description: Default command execution timeout in milliseconds applied to all commands. Zero means no timeout.

short_description.description: One-line description shown in parent help output

long_description.description: Detailed description shown in per-command help output

examples.description: Example usage lines shown in per-command help output

usage.description: Custom usage string shown instead of auto-generated usage line

deprecated.description: When true, marks the command as deprecated. Handlers can check .Deprecated to emit their own warnings.

inputs.description: Typed inputs for this command: flags, arguments, configuration file values, and environment variables

output.description: Declares the typed output shape for this command's Run handler. Generates a Result struct with the declared fields.

timeout.description: Command execution timeout in milliseconds. Zero means no timeout.

group.description: Group label matching a groups entry. Controls help output grouping.

arguments.description: Positional argument inputs for this command

config_values.description: Config file value inputs for this command

environment.description: Environment variable inputs for this command

stdin.description: Declares expected stdin format and schema for this command

description.description: Human-readable description shown in help output

deprecated.description: When true, marks the flag as deprecated. Handlers can check .Deprecated to emit their own warnings.

default.description: Default value when the flag is not provided

identifiers.description: CLI flag identifiers (e.g., '--force', '-f'). When absent, '--<name>' is auto-derived.

hidden.description: When true, the flag is hidden from help output

placeholder.description: Custom placeholder shown in help usage lines

example.description: Example value shown in help output

description.description: Human-readable description shown in help output

deprecated.description: When true, marks the argument as deprecated. Handlers can check .Deprecated to emit their own warnings.

default.description: Default value when the argument is not provided

example.description: Example value shown in help output

name.description: Logical name for this config value

default.description: Default value when the config key is absent

key.description: Key path within the config file (e.g., 'server.port')

name.description: Logical name for this env var input

default.description: Default value when the env var is absent

required.description: When true, error if stdin is empty

requires_exactly_one.description: Exactly one group of named inputs must be provided (mutually exclusive)

requires_all.description: All named inputs in each group must be provided together

requires_any.description: At least one group of named inputs must satisfy the constraint

forbids.description: None of the named inputs in each group may be provided together

param.description: Name of the input to check

equals.description: Condition is true when the input's value equals this string

present.description: Condition is true when the input was explicitly provided

when.description: All conditions must be true for this group to activate (allOf semantics). When absent, the group is unconditional.

min.description: Minimum number of positional arguments required

max.description: Maximum number of positional arguments allowed

exact.description: Exact number of positional arguments required

$ref.description: Reference to a component schema definition. Resolved at codegen time.
Reference to a component schema definition (e.g. '#/definition/components/schemas/MySchema'). Resolved at codegen time — the referenced schema is inlined before code generation.

type.description: The type used to parse and store the value. Accepts both Go type names (bool, int, float64, []string, duration, map) and JSON Schema standard names (boolean, integer, number, array, object) — both are equivalent. Custom Go types are also accepted (e.g. 'url.URL') when the required package is listed in configuration.imports.

enum.description: Allowed values; parsed values are validated against this list

pattern.description: Regular expression the value must match (string type only)

name.description: Logical name for the config file (e.g., 'app-config')

schema.description: When set, generates a typed config struct and validates required fields at load time.

name.description: Group label matching the 'group' field on commands

description.description: Optional description shown next to the group header in help output

behavior.description: fail_fast stops at the first validation error (default); fail_collect gathers all errors before returning

name.description: Name of the remote command. The dispatched binary must be named <program>-<name> and located in the same directory as the host binary.

short_description.description: One-line description shown in the host's help output.

aliases.description: Additional names that invoke this remote command.

hidden.description: When true, the remote command is excluded from help output.

deprecated.description: When true, marks the remote command as deprecated. Handlers can check .Deprecated to emit their own warnings.

group.description: Group label matching a groups entry. Controls help output grouping.

path.description: Base path for generated code. Framework is written to {path}/rotini/rotini.gen.go and handlers to {path}/cmd/rotini.gen.go.

imports.description: List of Go import paths to include in generated code as a convenience if types from external packages are desired in input or output types. Each entry is a package path (e.g., 'net/url') or an aliased import (e.g., 'myalias net/url').
